gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 focused review found no blocking or non-blocking issues. A residual risk about testing actual gitignore behavior was addressed with a git check-ignore governance test.
what_changed: Extended .gitignore to cover local env files, PEM/key/secret files, logs, temp files, and common generated test/build artifacts.
Documented that Databricks tokens, OpenAI keys, private keys, and service credentials must stay in environment variables or secret stores and out of benchmark/release/PR evidence.
Added governance tests for required ignore patterns and git check-ignore behavior.
why: Open-source readiness requires strong local secret hygiene because contributors may run Databricks, OpenAI, and private-key workflows while producing benchmark and release artifacts.
